elements.name: Veriy ASN creation through Post MessageUI-excel
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI, checking status of the shipment and completed receiving in Staging location through RF Menu

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response

comments.value: #Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "InTransit"

steps.name: user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "Receiving Started"
user log out from application

elements.name: B-345747 MANH - Receive and bypass stage or holding
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & validating LPN in Inventory by location

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response

comments.value: #Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "InTransit"

steps.name: user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "QSC Recv BpStgD" menu
user opens Inventory by location screen and validates the LPN created
user log out from application

elements.name: B-345784 MANH - Break Split LPN IB
elements.description: Creating ASN through Post Message UI and receiving in 2 LPN's. Move few quantities from 1st LPN to 2nd location & validating LPN's in Inventory by location

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into the Manhattan application
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response

comments.value: #Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "InTransit"

steps.name: user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
user break Split LPN and move to another LPN of same ASN
user opens Inventory by location screen and validates the LPN moved

comments.value: #Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "Receiving Started"

steps.name: user log out from application

elements.name: B-441160 Receiving Returned Un-Delivered Product using blind receipt

elements.name: B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock/unlock iLPN: Lock an iLPN using the user provided lock code
elements.description: Create an iLPN using RF MM3 Create iLPN option and apply the lock code provided by user

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "RF MM3 Create iLPN" operation
user open iLPN and applies the lock code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
validates the PIX Transactions "300,606" for this operation
user log out from application

elements.name: B-467729 – Configure Manhattan for RF lock/unlock iLPN: Unlock an iLPN which already has some lock

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Returns" menu
user open iLPN and unlock the existing code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
validates the PIX Transactions "300,606" for this operation
user log out from application

elements.name: B-427075 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_I Inventory Adjustments- Increase iLPN qty having no lock code before ASN verification
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & modify the 
iLPN by increasing the quantity & verify the iLPN, ASN and PIX transaction

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user create xml file using "Single Line ASN" with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "QSC Recv BpStgD" menu
user opens RF menu and "Increase" iLPN quantity using "Modify iLPN" menu in Inventory
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the modification "Increase Qty" in iLPN
user views ASN, and validate ASN details
validates the PIX Transactions "300" for modifying iLPN
user log out from application

elements.name: B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having no lock
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI and complete receiving bypasing through staging location & 
validating iLPN have no lock & consume the iLPN using RF Menu. Also validate PIX transaction

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user create xml file with updated ASNNo & DeliveryStartDate for ReceivingASN
user update xml itemDetails from excel sheet
user opens post message screen and upload file in order to create ASN
user verify the response

comments.value: #Then user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "InTransit"
#And user views ASN, get and verify item details

steps.name: user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "QSC Recv BpStgD" menu

comments.value: #And user views ASN, get and verify item details

steps.name: user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "Consume iLPN" operation
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the iLPN status
validates the PIX Transactions "300" for consuming iLPN
user log out from application

elements.name: B-474831 FXL-FFD-CIL-MH_Inventory Control-Base Transactions# 4- Consume iLPN having lock code
elements.description:
Creating iLPN through MM3 Create iLPN menu & applythe lock code,validating iLPN have some lock code & consume 
the iLPN using RF Menu. Also validate PIX transaction.

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user logs into Manhattan application using "Associate" Credentials
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "RF MM3 Create iLPN" operation
user open iLPN and applies the lock code
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the lock code
user opens RF menu and go to invenorty & perform "Consume iLPN" operation
user search for the LPN in iLPN screen, and validate the iLPN status
validates the PIX Transactions "606" for consuming iLPN
user log out from application
